title: justicia tutukuensis
intro: Justicia tutukuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Justicia tutukuensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
